text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient arrives in ER following a car accident of moderate intensity.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Brought by Basic Emergency Services with immobilization devices.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "A clear airways B eupnoeic on room air, RF 17breaths/min, no use of accessory muscles, no pathological respiratory noises, SpO2-97% C capillary refill <2sec, rhythmic radial pulses no tachycardia, Pao 164/97mmHg, HR 73bpm, positioned CVP upper left limb, blood tests + venous EGA performed, AG swab performed D GCS 15, lucid, oriented, cooperative E apyretic, head-to-toe examination - presence of FLC right eyebrow, right knee excoriation, no lower limb sensitivity deficit, stable pelvis, chest pain on deep inhalation radiological diagnostics performed Stud PERSONS_NAME M", 0.0, 0.5)
